title: Object-Oriented Architecture and Capstone Delivery · Spiral Review
summary: Deliver an extensible community-resource workflow with a domain core, replaceable boundaries, migrations, and operator evidence. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a production-shaped object-oriented capstone after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate domain rules, application orchestration, infrastructure adapters, and user interface concerns with explicit dependencies.
Use domain services only for cohesive rules that do not naturally belong to one entity or value object.
Version persisted representations and migrate data without coupling domain objects directly to historical storage schemas.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

# Add one tested, typed, inspectable program increment per activity.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: python oop architecture capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Oop Capstone Evidence trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for defend substitutability, invariants, typing, tests, persistence, failures, security, and maintainability with changed-case evidence.

content.text: For Oop Capstone Evidence, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Oop Capstone Evidence precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed review case derived from this module: python oop architecture capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A class count and UML diagram demonstrate object-oriented mastery.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Oop Capstone Evidence applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend substitutability, invariants, typing, tests, persistence, failures, security, and maintainability with changed-case evidence.
